title: helichrysum saxatile subsp. errerae
intro: Helichrysum saxatile subsp. errerae, also known as the Yellow Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum saxatile subsp. errerae lie in its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including wound healing, reducing inflammation and pain, and promoting immune function, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Helichrysum saxatile subsp. errerae can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized effectively.
